xwikidoc.name: Translations
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
modal.ok=OK modal.cancel=Cancel modal.close=Close
resource.attach.label=Attachment resource.attach.placeholder=Path.To.Page@attachment.png resource.data.label=Data URI resource.doc.label=Page resource.doc.placeholder=Path.To.Page resource.icon.label=Icon resource.mailto.label=Mail Address resource.mailto.placeholder=user@example.org resource.path.label=Path resource.path.placeholder=/path/to/file resource.unc.label=UNC Path resource.unc.placeholder=//server/share/path/to/file resource.unknown.label=Unknown resource.url.label=URL resource.url.placeholder=http://www.example.org/image.png resource.user.label=User resource.user.placeholder=alias
resourcePicker.attach.hint=Select an attachment resourcePicker.doc.hint=Select a page resourcePicker.dropdown.toggle.title=Toggle the display of resource types.
entityResourceSuggester.doc.placeholder=Find a page... entityResourceSuggester.attach.placeholder=Find an attachment... entityResourceSuggester.create.resolvedInSpace=Create new page... entityResourceSuggester.create.fullyResolvedInput=Create with exact reference...
entityResourcePicker.select=Select entityResourcePicker.doc.title=Select Page entityResourcePicker.attach.title=Select Attachment
macroSelector.title=Select Macro macroSelector.filter.text.placeholder=Type to filter macroSelector.filter.category.all=All Macros macroSelector.filter.category.other=Other macroSelector.filter.category.notinstalled=Not installed macroSelector.failedToRetrieveMacros=Failed to retrieve the list of available macros. macroSelector.select=Select macroSelector.recommended=Recommended macroSelector.install=Install macroSelector.install.confirm=You are about to install the extension {0} {1}. Are you sure you want to continue ? macroSelector.install.notAllowed=You are not allowed to install this extension macroSelector.filter.category.placeholder=Select a category...
macroEditor.title=Edit Macro macroEditor.more=More macroEditor.required=Required macroEditor.deprecated=Deprecated macroEditor.advanced=Advanced macroEditor.changeMacro=Change Macro macroEditor.submit=Submit macroEditor.content=Content macroEditor.noParameters=This macro has no parameters. macroEditor.descriptorRequestFailed=Failed to retrieve the {0} macro descriptor. macroEditor.parametersRequestFailed=Failed to retrieve the parameters for {0}. macroEditor.installRequestFailed=Failed to install the {0} macro. macroEditor.selectFeature=Select parameter {0}
imageEditor.modal.changeImage.button=Change Image imageEditor.modal.loadFail.message=Failed to retrieve the image editor form. imageEditor.modal.title=Edit Image imageEditor.modal.insertButton=Insert imageEditor.modal.updateButton=Update imageEditor.modal.initialization.fail=Failed to retrieve the image selection form. imageEditor.modal.outscaleWarning=One of the dimensions is larger than the original image ({0}). The result may be a reduction in the quality of the displayed image. imageSelector.modal.title=Select Image imageSelector.modal.selectButton=Select imageSelector.modal.loadFail.message=Failed to retrieve the image selection form. imageSelector.modal.fileUpload.success=File upload succeeded. imageSelector.modal.fileUpload.fail=File upload failed. imageSelector.modal.fileUpload.abort=File upload aborted. imageSelector.modal.initialization.fail=Failed to retrieve the image selection form.
wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.title=Standard wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.title=Advanced wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.imageStyles.label=Image Styles wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.imageStyles.hint=Select the style to apply on the image. wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.alt.label=Alternative Text wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.alt.hint=Define an alternate text for an image, if the image cannot be displayed. wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.caption.label=Caption wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.caption.hint=Activate and define an image caption. wysiwyg.imageEditor.standardTab.caption.ariaLabel=Activate and define an image caption.
wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.size.label=Size wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.size.width.label=Width wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.size.height.label=Height wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.size.hint=Define the image size. wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.border.label=Border wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.border.hint=When checked, the image is displayed with a border wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.alignment.label=Alignment wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.alignment.hint=Define the image alignment. wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.alignment.option.none=None wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.alignment.option.start=Start wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.alignment.option.center=Center wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.alignment.option.end=End wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.textWrap.label=Text Wrap wysiwyg.imageEditor.advancedTab.textWrap.hint=When checked, the text is wrapped around the image.
wysiwyg.imageSelector.treeTab.title=Tree wysiwyg.imageSelector.uploadTab.title=Upload wysiwyg.imageSelector.uploadTab.file.title=File wysiwyg.imageSelector.uploadTab.file.hint=Select a local file to add to the page. wysiwyg.imageSelector.uploadTab.uploadButton=Upload wysiwyg.imageSelector.iconTab.title=Icon wysiwyg.imageSelector.iconTab.icon.title=Icon wysiwyg.imageSelector.iconTab.icon.hint=The identifier of the icon to display as an image. wysiwyg.imageSelector.iconTab.icon.placeholder=accept wysiwyg.imageSelector.urlTab.title=Url wysiwyg.imageSelector.urlTab.url.title=Url wysiwyg.imageSelector.urlTab.url.hint=The url of the image to display. wysiwyg.imageSelector.urlTab.url.placeholder=https://...
wysiwyg.upload.error.csrf=The CSRF token is missing. wysiwyg.upload.error.emptyReturn=Error when uploading the file: it might exceed the configured maximum upload size.
## Used to indicate where deprecated keys start #@deprecatedstart
## Deprecated since 14.10 imageEditor.modal.backToEditor.button=Back
## Used to indicate where deprecated keys end #@deprecatedend
